name: Linda Hopkins
description: African American actress and blues and gospel singer (1924-2017)
abstract: Linda Hopkins (born Melinda Helen Matthews; December 14, 1924 – April 10, 2017) was an American actress and blues and gospel singer. She recorded classic, traditional, and urban blues, and performed R&B and soul, jazz, and show tunes.

concerts.label: Artists' Tribute to the Life of Paul Robeson (1898-1976)

about_quotes.speaker: Arnett Cobb
